title: DynamicNameplates
description: See nameplates only when they make sense- when someone is in your line of sight or close enough to notice. Configurable rendering modes let you balance immersion and awareness.
body:
# Dynamic Nameplates

**Cleaner nameplates. Fully configurable.**

Dynamic Nameplates replaces Minecraft’s always-visible player name tags with a more immersive, dynamic system. Nameplates only appear when you’re actually looking at someone, near them, or within a configurable tolerance zone - making gameplay feel more realistic while still preserving useful visibility when you need it.

## ✨ Features
- Hide nameplates unless players are detected by your gaze, proximity, or awareness zone
- Three rendering modes:
  - Crosshair Mode - Nameplate shows only when directly targeted
  - Cube Mode - Shows when within a widening “cone of vision”
  - Area Mode - Simple distance-based visibility
- Separate close-range and long-range behavior
- Fully configurable distance, angles, and scaling
- Toggle key + hold-to-show key
- ModMenu support for easy in-game configuration
- Client-side only - No server installation required

![Displays no nameplate being rendered due to the crosshair not being near them.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Sv4A3V6Z/images/75fffd610ce0ea1c6800bf7f901effbb6faca62f.png)
